title: HGN TerraFirmaCraft
description: TerraFirmaCraft based mod collection for the HGN.hu TFC server.
body:
# About this modpack
This forge-based modpack builds around the TerraFirmaCraft mod with a couple addons and compatibility mods to enhance the experience while staying close to the base TFC gameplay.

ps.: this modpack is mainly for our private server but feel free to play with it

## Roadmap
Currently I have no exact roadmap for this pack, I'll update mods when needed and try to keep TFC up-to-date as they release new versions. Maybe I'll recreate my old coin-smithing addon for TFC in the near future and add it to the pack, we'll see.

## External mods (from CurseForge):
- [Astikor Carts TFC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astikor-carts-tfc) by Verph
